abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Incorporeal
abilities.text: Reduce damage dealt to this model by 1. Damage from (magic) actions may not be reduced this way.

abilities.name: Loose Bowels
abilities.text: Once per activation. When an enemy model within 3" declares an action, this model may remove a Blight token from the enemy to make the action fail.

actions.name: Mouthful of Misery
actions.effects: This model may remove a Blight token from the target to deal +2 damage.

triggers.name: Pouncing Strike
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with a different enemy model within 5". Then, declare this action again, targeting that enemy model.

actions.name: The Red Death
actions.effects: The target gains a Blight token.

triggers.name: One by One Dropped the Revelers
triggers.text: Once per activation. Enemy models within (aura)3" of the target gain a Blight token.

triggers.name: Fever Bloom
triggers.text: Remove a Blight token from the target. The target is dealt 1 damage and gains a Stunned token.

triggers.name: Quarantine
triggers.text: This model and the target gain an Aura (Hazardous) token.

actions.name: Drink Spirit
actions.effects: This model heals 1 for each enemy model within range with a Blight token.

triggers.name: Sacrifice the Scurried
triggers.text: Kill another friendly vermin model within 3" of this model. This model heals 2.
